note: Each act = one course. chapters points at that course's chapter manifest. Drop a chapter file (data/courses/<id>/ch<code>.json) to populate that level — the GUI fetches it automatically. heavyProblems are the act-boss's final CSE gauntlet, handed out once every chapter + side lane is cleared.

acts.name: GHOST DAEMON
heavyProblems: PID-file daemon supervisor with graceful TERM handling
WAL-mode SQLite job queue with concurrent readers
Streaming btmon parser as a state machine

acts.name: NAME EATER
heavyProblems: Recursive DNS resolver with TTL cache + eviction
Concurrent subdomain brute-forcer with rate limiting

acts.name: HOLLOW SIGNAL
heavyProblems: Async TCP port scanner with bounded concurrency
ASN → prefix resolver with PeeringDB cache

acts.name: FINAL RENDER
heavyProblems: XSS-safe template renderer (escape + URL scheme check)
